phrases.intent_en: Ask where the lifeguard station is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿podría decirme dónde está el puesto de socorristas?
phrases.pronunciation: Dis-KOOl-pe, po-DREE-a de-SEER-me DON-de es-TAH el PWES-to de so-ko-REES-tas?

likely_response.local: Cerca de la entrada principal, torre blanca.
likely_response.pronunciation: THEHR-kah DEH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL TOHR-reh BLAHN-kah
likely_response.translation_en: Near the main entrance, white tower.

responses.english: Near the main entrance, white tower.
responses.phonetic: THEHR-kah DEH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah preen-thee-PAHL TOHR-reh BLAHN-kah
responses.local: Cerca de la entrada principal, torre blanca.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the beach showers are
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿sabe dónde están las duchas de la playa?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, SAH-beh DON-deh es-TAHN lahs DOO-chahs deh lah PLAH-yah?

likely_response.local: Al final del paseo, junto a los baños.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL fee-NAHL DEHL pah-SEH-oh HOON-toh AH LOHS BAH-nyohs
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the promenade, next to restrooms.

responses.english: At the end of the promenade, next to restrooms.
responses.phonetic: AHL fee-NAHL DEHL pah-SEH-oh HOON-toh AH LOHS BAH-nyohs
responses.local: Al final del paseo, junto a los baños.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the safe swimming area is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde está la zona segura para bañarse?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, DOHN-deh es-TAH la SOH-nah seh-GOO-rah pah-rah bah-NYAR-seh?

likely_response.local: Entre las boyas amarillas, frente a la torre.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHNT-reh LAHS BOH-yahs ah-mah-REEL-lahs FREHN-teh AH LAH TOHR-reh
likely_response.translation_en: Between the yellow buoys, opposite the tower.

responses.english: Between the yellow buoys, opposite the tower.
responses.phonetic: EHNT-reh LAHS BOH-yahs ah-mah-REEL-lahs FREHN-teh AH LAH TOHR-reh
responses.local: Entre las boyas amarillas, frente a la torre.

phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde puedo alquilar tumbonas en la playa?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh ahl-kee-LAHR toom-BOH-nahs en lah PLAH-yah

likely_response.local: En el chiringuito azul, junto a las escaleras.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL chee-reen-g-EE-toh ah-THOOL HOON-toh AH LAHS eh-skah-LEH-rahs
likely_response.translation_en: At the blue kiosk, next to the stairs.

responses.english: At the blue kiosk, next to the stairs.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL chee-reen-g-EE-toh ah-THOOL HOON-toh AH LAHS eh-skah-LEH-rahs
responses.local: En el chiringuito azul, junto a las escaleras.
